SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.service

Class OrganizerService

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.service.OrganizerService
@Service public class OrganizerService extends Object
Service class handling complex business logic for Controllers.

Unlike AuthService which handles authentication, this service manages operations requiring interaction between different entities (e.g., an Organizer creating an Organization).

    • getOrganizerById

      public OrganizerDTO getOrganizerById(String id)
      Returns the Organizer from the id
      Parameters:
      id - The id of the organizer
      Returns:
      The wanted organizer or null

    • registerOrganization

      @Transactional public OrganizationDTO registerOrganization(OrganizationDTO organizationDTO, String id)
      Registers a new Organization linked to an existing Organizer.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the organization name is unique.
      2. Retrieves the creating Organizer from the database.
      3. Creates the Organization entity and adds the creator as the first member.
      4. Saves the Organization to MongoDB.
      5. Creates and saves the corresponding node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      organizationDTO - The details of the organization to create.
      id - The id of the authenticated Organizer (creator).
      Returns:
      The created OrganizationDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the organization name is taken or the organizer is not found.

    • registerEvent

      @Transactional public EventDTO registerEvent(EventDTO eventDTO, String id, String role)
      Register a new Event

      This method:

      1. Create the Document for the Event
      2. Add the Node for the event
      3. Create the Relationship with the Organizer
      4. Create the Relationship with the Topics (creating the nodes whenever they don't exist)

      Parameters:
      eventDTO - The Event's details
      id - Id of the organizer
      Returns:
      The created EventDTO
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the organization name is not found or if the organizationNode is not found or if the data are not consistent

    • updateOrganizer

      @Transactional public OrganizerDTO updateOrganizer(String id, OrganizerDTO newOrganizerDTO)
      Updates and Organizer data

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Organizer exists.
      2. Checks for consistency: username and date of birth can't be changed
      3. Updates the specific data for the organizer
      4. Updates the Organizations data if the Organizer is part of some
      5. Saves the updated Organizer to MongoDB.
      6. Updates the corresponding node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      id - The id of the Organizer to update.
      newOrganizerDTO - The OrganizerDTO with the updated data.
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizerDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the organizer is not found or if the user tries to update username or password.

    • deleteOrganizationMembership

      @Transactional public OrganizerDTO deleteOrganizationMembership(String id, String orgName)
      Deletes the membership of an Organizer to an Organization

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Organizer exists.
      2. Checks if the Organization exists.
      3. Deletes the Organization from the Organizer's organizations.
      4. Deletes the Organizer (Member) from the Organization's members.
      5. Saves the updated Organizer to MongoDB.

      Parameters:
      id - The id of the Organizer whose membership must be deleted.
      orgName - The name of the Organization from whom the Organizer wants to delete the membership.
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizerDTO
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the organizer is not found or if the Organization is not found.
